source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for lightweight product UI with Noto Sans guidance for multilingual labels, analytical tables, and crisp numeric rhythm.
layout: Precise 8px analytical grids, transparent wing-vein dividers, reed-like navigation rails, compact dashboard cards, and airy wetland spacing.

prompts.label: Transparent Motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a blue dasher dragonfly, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A blue dasher dragonfly with glass-blue translucent wings, fine graphite wing veins, reed-green thorax details, blue abdomen, delicate legs, accurate insect anatomy, and crisp silhouette edges.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show all four wings and the full body without cropping.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves transparent wing detail, blue body color, and fine vein structure.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no flowers, no pond background, no reed perch, no second insect.

prompts.label: Light Design System
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Dragonfly" derived from the visible transparent blue dasher dragonfly cutout.
Reference use: This light design-system board is the source reference for coding the theme. Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the glass-blue wings, reed-green thorax, graphite veins, wetland neutrals, and translucent membrane surfaces in the visible dragonfly cutout.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board.
Required visible sections: Morphous Dragonfly, Blue Dasher, Palette, Typography, Multilingual Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and multilingual examples; use labels like Geist, Noto Sans, Heading, Body, Label, Numeric. Show product UI guidance for analytical dashboards.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line/bar charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, realistic UI mockup, precise grid, 8px card radius, airy pale surfaces, wing-vein dividers, transparent overlays, lightweight analytical hierarchy.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the motif: glass blue, reed green, graphite, sky cyan, wetland amber, mist white, wing membrane, and pond graphite.
Text: use short readable UI labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple gradients, no stock UI kit look, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Dragonfly" or "Blue Dasher".

prompts.label: Dark Design System
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Dragonfly" / "Blue Dasher Dragonfly". Translate the light-mode Morphous Dragonfly board into dark mode; keep it recognizably the same system, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the transparent blue dasher dragonfly motif and the light-mode Morphous Dragonfly board as strict references for palette roles, texture rhythm, component coverage, typography hierarchy, and board organization.
Canvas: wide 16:9 comprehensive design-system board.
Required visible sections: Morphous Dragonfly, Blue Dasher Dragonfly, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Visual details: dark background derived from graphite thorax and pond graphite; readable text in mist reed white; glass-blue wing colors as primary action and chart color; reed green support color; sky vein cyan focus color; wetland amber accents; translucent wing-vein grids and membrane panels; precise analytical hierarchy; shadcn/tweakcn-style controls; compact 8px radius cards and controls.
Typography: include English and Japanese guidance with short readable labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Numeric, 見出し, 本文, ラベル, 数字.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line and bar charts, table rows, command/search menu, status chips, loading/empty/error states, texture samples, spacing/radius/shadow/tokens swatches.
Constraints: no parrot, no raspberry, no grape, no butterfly, no unrelated insects, no generic blue-purple gradients, no neon rainbow palette, no pure black flat-only background, no stock UI kit look, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Dragonfly" or "Blue Dasher Dragonfly".
